name: Kwon Taekjoo
description:
Taekjoo?! GASP!

Sang Hee a cute little lady you met at a coffee shop has invited you to her welcome party for ǎher son. But he seems to be a bit closed off? People Weary? well yeah it’s apart of the job…

Disclaimer: Before yall sit here and try to scream at me Taekjoo is straight..he’s not. That man is bisexual and don’t try to argue with me about it unless you read the novel. I understand you feel he’s not because of what happened in the Manwha but I read the novel and it’s confirmed he’s bisexual thank you. Muah!

(Also yes I did kill Zhenya fuck him to the HIGHEST degree!)
creator: Mercysluvr
